backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Rupee Tracker backend, defining expense and user profile data types, CRUD operations for expenses (add, get, delete, filter by date/range), and user profile management, all gated behind role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with their IDs, titles, affected files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels — covering the redesigned Add Expense form, decorative background pattern, high-amount expense highlighting, and other UI improvements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON map of frontend source file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's role and recent changes in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with mobile/PWA meta tags, an amber theme color, and a root div that mounts the app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, shows a login screen for unauthenticated users, a profile setup modal for new users, and the main tabbed UI (Add Expense, History, Repay Report) for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky header component displaying the app logo, title, INR badge, and a login/logout button that integrates with Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom tab bar with three tabs (Add Expense, History, Repay Report), active-state indicators, and accessible aria labels.
frontend/src/components/CategoryBadge.ts: React component that renders a styled badge for an expense category, displaying an icon, label, and optional sub-category using utility maps from categoryUtils.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations: fetching/saving user profiles, querying expenses by date or range, and adding/deleting expenses.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, category badge component classes, and celebration animation keyframes.
frontend/src/lib/categoryUtils.ts: Utility module that defines category metadata (labels, icons, badge classes, sub-categories) and helper functions for mapping, building, and formatting expense categories.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddExpense.tsx: Page component for adding a new expense, featuring a category picker, sub-category and repay-name fields, amount/note inputs, and a celebration overlay animation triggered on large expenses.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Expense history page with filter modes (all/date/range), category chip filters, sorted expense list with delete capability, category totals, and high-spend highlighting.
frontend/src/pages/RepayReport.tsx: Displays a report of 'Repay' cash transfer expenses grouped by person name, showing per-person totals and a grand total of outstanding repayments.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Nunito/Poppins), oklch-based design tokens, saffron/amber color palettes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing the expense tracker app's features, architecture (localStorage-based, mobile-first), known issues, and existing feature list at version 11.
